$schema.description: Must match the `$id` form of the manifest schema. Relative paths are not allowed; editors and AI generators should emit the canonical ID so validators can resolve the schema without filesystem walking.

id.description: Namespaced pack id; see content-system-policy.md § 1. Pattern requires at least one underscore-separated segment so two community authors cannot collide on a flat name like `fire_faction`.

engineHash.description: Hex digest of the engine build this pack was authored against. Pinned by saves/replays/multiplayer. Pre-M2: optional and unused — the engine does not exist yet, so there is no stable hash to pin against. Post-M2: required at load time when a trusted runtime asks for reproducible play.

contentHash.description: Hex digest of the canonical-JSON serialization of every record in the pack. Produced by the content-runtime at pack build time. Required for multiplayer and trusted replay.

dependencies.description: Each entry is { id, version } where version is a semver range. Plain string entries are accepted during the migration window and treated as { id, version: "*" }; see pack-resolver.md and content-system-policy.md § 2.

overrides.description: Replace or patch records contributed by packs in this pack's dependency chain. See content-system-policy.md § 3 and pack-resolver.md § 4.

changelog.description: Per-version list of namespaced record IDs that changed. Lets save/replay/AI tooling diff between two pack versions without re-hashing every record. See content-system-policy.md § 5.

capabilities.description: Closed enum of pack capabilities. Default-deny: a pack that omits this field is treated as `["scripts.none"]`. Capability declarations are load-bearing per `ugc-safety.md` § Capability Enforcement; the loader applies byte-level sniffs when `scripts.none` is declared. Any `scripts.*` token other than `scripts.none` is rejected at validation time unless `pack-scripting.md` § 1 enumerates it in a versioned row.

aiProvenance.description: Optional manifest-level re-assertion of `GeneratedFaction.notes` so the loader can read provenance without parsing every record. Populated by AI-generation Stage 6 (pack materialize). When `present = true`, screen 74 (`ai-provenance-detail`) renders this block on player request.

signature.description: Optional Ed25519 signature over the canonical signed message defined in `pack-signing.md` § 1: canonical-JSON of `{ id, version, contentHash, engineHash, dependencies, capabilities, sandboxed, assetDigest, previousKeyId }`. The verification order is pinned in `pack-signing.md` § 2. Comparison is constant-time per `crypto-rules.md`.

value.description: Lower-case hex Ed25519 signature (64 bytes / 128 hex chars). Tighter than `minLength: 1` so the schema rejects truncated or off-format signatures before the verifier runs.

assetDigest.description: Optional xxh64 digest of the canonical-JSON of `assets/index.json`. Required field of the canonical signed message in `pack-signing.md` § 1; binds binary asset bytes (each row carries its own `sha256`) to the manifest signature so a swapped sprite invalidates the Ed25519 signature.

previousKeyId.description: Optional rotation marker. When non-null, declares a prior `keyId` that the verifier must consult against the trust store; combined with `rotationProof`, lets a publisher rotate keys without breaking TOFU. See `pack-signing.md` § 7 Key rotation.

rotationProof.description: Optional Ed25519 signature by `previousKeyId` over canonical-JSON of `{ packId, newKeyId, validFrom }`. Required when `previousKeyId` is non-null. See `pack-signing.md` § 7.

signaturePolicy.description: Optional pack-side signature policy hint. Pack loaders consult `publisher-registry` and the runtime context (single-player / friendly MP / ranked MP) to decide refusal. See `pack-signing.md` § 5.

trustTier.description: Optional declared trust tier. When present and signature-verified, the loader treats it as authoritative; otherwise the loader derives the tier per `sandbox-model.md` § 1. Default for any pack that omits the field: `sandboxed`. The `manifest.sandboxed` boolean is derived: `sandboxed === (trustTier === "sandboxed")`.

baseUrl.description: Optional override for the asset-resolution base URL. Constrained to `blob:`, the new `pack://<packId>/` virtual scheme, or a same-origin absolute path (`/...`). `http:`, `https:`, `file:`, `data:`, and any cross-origin URL are rejected by `AssetRegistry.registerPack`. See `sandbox-model.md` § 2 (capability matrix) and `asset-loading.md` § 2 (pre-flight pipeline).

contentRating.description: Optional author-asserted content rating. Advisory only; not consumed by gameplay or matchmaking gates in v1. Surfaced by screen 72 (pack-trust prompt) under "Author-declared content" per `pack-trust.md` § Content Rating. The `overallRating` aggregate is consumed by `config.player.ageGate` per `docs/architecture/age-gate.md`: `under13` profiles filter out packs whose `overallRating` is above `everyone`.

overallRating.description: Closed aggregate rating. Optional on read for backwards compatibility; missing maps to `everyone`. Consumed by the age-gate filter per `docs/architecture/age-gate.md`.

sandboxedReason.description: Optional reason this pack is sandboxed; consumed by the sandbox-enforcement layer (matchmaker, lobby, replay validator, editor) to render *why* a pack is quarantined. See pack-contract.md § Sandbox enforcement.

generation.description: Optional version pin written by the AI-generation pipeline at Stage 6 (pack materialize). Authoritative for reproducibility — `notes.providerId` on the GeneratedFaction record is best-effort metadata only. See `generation-config.schema.json` and `ai-generation-pipeline.md`.
